name: Sarah Chen
message: Looking for a web development partner for our SaaS platform. Budget around $15-20k, hoping to launch a new dashboard by end of Q2. We need someone who has done B2B SaaS projects before.

name: Mike Johnson
message: Hey, I saw your portfolio and I have a small project — thinking of a redesign for my own site. Budget is tight, maybe $1-2k, no real deadline. Let me know if you're interested.

name: Rachel Torres
message: We need a complete rebrand and new website. We have $30k set aside and want to move fast — ideally starting next month. We're a growing restaurant group with 8 locations.

name: Alex Kim
message: Hey, I've been looking for someone to collaborate on client projects. I do design, you could do dev. Split 50/50. Interested in chatting?

name: Priya Sharma
message: Need help with our online booking system and website updates. Budget $4-6k. Timeline is flexible — whenever you have availability. Found you through a referral.

name: Tom Williams
message: Can you build an app for free in exchange for equity? We're a startup. Really innovative idea. Let me know.
